item.title: Version 0.1.4
item.description:
• Share button next to the reload icon — send the current page anywhere via the system share sheet.
  • Cmd-Shift-C copies the current URL to the clipboard, with a quiet "Copied" confirmation next to the address.
  • Fixed a glitch where switching workspaces could briefly clip the top tab under the "TABS" label.

item.title: Version 0.1.5
item.description: • Frameless window — the title bar is gone; traffic lights now float directly over the sidebar, right at the top edge of the window.

item.title: Version 0.1.6
item.description:
• Frameless window — the title bar is gone; traffic lights sit right at the top edge, floating directly over the sidebar and address bar instead of a separate bar above them.
  • Fixed: pressing Cmd-T for a new tab put the cursor in the sidebar's search field instead of the page's own search — typing a URL there and hitting enter opened a second tab instead of loading into the one you just opened. New tabs now focus the page search, so typing and hitting enter loads into the tab you're on.

item.title: Version 0.1.7
item.description:
• Quick Look (Cmd-Option-N, or Cmd-Option-click a tab): a small detached window for a one-off lookup. Close it and it's gone — no tab clutter — or "Open in …" to promote it into a real workspace.
  • Pinned Tabs: right-click any tab to pin it. Pinned tabs stick around above your regular list and stay anchored to their site — an outbound link opens in Glance instead of replacing the page you pinned.
  • Favorites: the same idea, but global — reachable from every workspace as a row of icons above the workspace switcher. Cmd-1 through Cmd-9 jump straight to one.
  • Glance: a lightweight preview that floats over your current window when a pinned or favorited tab sends you somewhere else — expand it into a real tab, or close it (click outside, the X, or Cmd-W) and carry on where you were.
  • Real favicons for anything you've pinned or favorited, in place of the letter-chip icon.
  • Fixed a bug where promoting a Quick Look/Glance page into a workspace could leave it blank instead of showing the page.
  • Fixed Gmail's "View Order"-style links opening a plain new tab instead of Glance.

A tab drifts away —
pin it, and it stays right here.
Quiet harbor found.

item.title: Version 0.1.8
item.description: • Fixed a crash on launch affecting fresh installs (thank you to whoever hit this and reported it!). It never showed up in testing because of an accidental fallback specific to the machine each release was built on — every other machine hit the crash immediately on open. Should be solid now on any Mac.

item.title: Version 0.1.9
item.description: • Added a plain + button next to the workspace name for creating a new workspace — no need to already know that clicking the workspace name opens a menu.

item.title: Version 0.1.10
item.description: • Fixed: Pinned Tabs, Favorites, and favicons were treating a subdomain like home.example.com as the same site as example.com — showing the wrong favicon, and letting a pinned tab's anchor-to-its-site behavior misfire for self-hosted setups (Home Assistant and similar). Subdomains are now always treated as distinct sites, as they should be.
